text.title: Rust Ownership Procedure
text.summary: 5-step audit applied per function before writing the body.

step.name: list-callers
step.action: Run `grep -rn 'fn_name(' src/` or `cargo check` to enumerate call sites. Note for each whether caller has owned or borrowed value.

step.name: answer-3-questions
step.action: Answer: (1) keeps_value — does the fn store the input, return it, or drop it? (2) modifies_value — does it write through the input? (3) shares_across_threads — does any path spawn a thread / async task with the input?

step.name: pick-signature
step.action: Apply decision tree in 06-decision-tree.xml. Write the chosen signature. Add a 3-line audit comment above the fn using `templates/ownership-audit-comment.tmpl.rs`.

step.name: cargo-check
step.action: Run `cargo check`. If borrow checker complains: re-audit; do NOT add `.clone()` or `Rc<RefCell>` reflexively. Common fix: split call site so two `&mut` references do not overlap.
step.decision-gate: If body genuinely cannot compile without `.clone()` AND the value is small (Copy or small struct): accept the clone with a `// clone justified: small + cold path` comment.

step.name: record
step.action: Emit decision-record JSON per 02-output-contract.xml schema. Append to crate-level `ownership-decisions.json`.
